attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_PROCESS_SUMMARY)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LEDGER_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTING_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SUMMARY_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CATEGORY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_DR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ENTERED_CR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_DR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CR, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.ACCOUNTED_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_NUMBER, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.BATCH_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT1, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT2, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT3, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT4, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT5, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT6, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT7, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT8, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT9, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT10, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT11, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT12, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT13, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT14, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SEGMENT15, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY,
 (
 select PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY
 minus
 select PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID = STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CP_PROCESS_SUMMARY.REFRESH_DATETIME
